commands.name: adt build list
commands.description: Admin: list ADT builds under a linkage's game (cli.md §6.5, PRD §4.8).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt build list --linkage-id 01J0... --game-id mygame

commands.name: adt diagnostics
commands.description: Admin: report which adt.Client kind was wired at boot + presence of the env vars that fed the gate (PRD §4.8 / 2026-05-21 silent-fallback recovery).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: adt games list
commands.description: Admin: list ADT games under a linkage's namespace (cli.md §6.5, PRD §4.8; STATUS_M5.md B12).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt games list --linkage-id 01J0...

commands.name: adt linkage complete
commands.description: Admin: finalize an ADT link by consuming the state nonce + adt_namespace echoed on the callback URL (PRD §4.8.2).

requiredFlags.name: --state
requiredFlags.description: linking state nonce returned from `adt linkage start`

requiredFlags.name: --adt-namespace
requiredFlags.description: ADT namespace echoed by the redirect-back URL

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt linkage complete --state EXAMPLE --adt-namespace adt-ns

commands.name: adt linkage list
commands.description: Admin: list every ADT linkage scoped to the caller's studio (cli.md §6.5, PRD §4.8).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt linkage list

commands.name: adt linkage recover
commands.description: Admin: adopt an orphan ADT-side linkage (flag present on ADT, no local row) without an OAuth round-trip (PRD §4.8).

requiredFlags.name: --adt-namespace
requiredFlags.description: ADT namespace whose orphan flag to adopt

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt linkage recover --adt-namespace adt-ns

commands.name: adt linkage start
commands.description: Admin: mint a linkUrl + state nonce for the ADT linking redirect (PRD §4.8.2).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt linkage start

commands.name: adt linkage unlink
commands.description: Admin: soft-delete an ADT linkage row + best-effort DELETE on the ADT side (PRD §4.8).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin adt linkage unlink --id 01J0...

commands.name: announcement create
commands.description: Admin: send a bulk Discord DM broadcast (PRD §5.4 "Bulk announcements"). Recipients resolve at call time per the --send-to filter.

requiredFlags.name: --subject
requiredFlags.description: broadcast subject (1-200 chars; rejected with byte-exact errors.md string outside that range)

optionalFlags.name: --send-to
optionalFlags.description: recipient filter: ALL|APPROVED_ONLY|PENDING_ONLY (default APPROVED_ONLY)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin announcement create --playtest-id 01J0... --send-to APPROVED_ONLY --subject "Build update" --message "New patch live"

commands.name: announcement list
commands.description: Admin: list announcement history for a playtest (PRD §5.4 "Bulk announcements").

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant accept-nda
commands.description: Persist a versioned NDA acceptance for the calling player (cli.md §6.2).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant approve
commands.description: Admin: approve an applicant; reserves + grants a code (cli.md §6.2, PRD §4.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant get-code
commands.description: Fetch the granted code for the calling player. Player token required (cli.md §6.2).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant list
commands.description: Admin: list applicants on a playtest. Server-side status + dm-failed filters (cli.md §6.2).

optionalFlags.name: --status
optionalFlags.description: applicant status filter: PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED

optionalFlags.name: --dm-failed
optionalFlags.description: only rows where last_dm_status='failed'

optionalFlags.name: --cursor
optionalFlags.description: opaque page_token from a prior response

optionalFlags.name: --page-size
optionalFlags.description: page size (0 → server default 50)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin applicant list --playtest 01J0... --status PENDING

commands.name: applicant reject
commands.description: Admin: reject an applicant (cli.md §6.2). Optional --reason ≤500 chars.

optionalFlags.name: --reason
optionalFlags.description: admin-visible rejection reason (≤500 chars)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin applicant reject --id 01J0... --reason 'duplicate signup'

commands.name: applicant retry-dm
commands.description: Admin: re-enqueue the Discord DM for an applicant (cli.md §6.2).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant retry-failed-dms
commands.description: Admin: bulk-enqueue every applicant whose last DM is in the failed state for a playtest (cli.md §6.3, PRD §5.5).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: applicant signup
commands.description: Sign up the calling player to a playtest. Requires a player token (cli.md §6.1).

requiredFlags.name: --platforms
requiredFlags.description: comma-separated platforms owned (at least one of STEAM,XBOX,PLAYSTATION,EPIC,OTHER)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --profile player applicant signup --slug summer-stress-test --platforms STEAM,XBOX

commands.name: applicant status
commands.description: Show the calling player's applicant row for a playtest (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: audit list
commands.description: Admin: list audit log rows for a playtest. Cursor pagination on (createdAt, id) DESC; --actor='system' filters system-emitted rows (cli.md §6.3, PRD §4.7).

optionalFlags.name: --actor
optionalFlags.description: actor filter: 'system' (rows where actor_user_id IS NULL) or a UUID

optionalFlags.name: --action
optionalFlags.description: action filter: exact match on the action string (schema.md audit-action catalogue)

optionalFlags.name: --cursor
optionalFlags.description: opaque page_token from a prior response

optionalFlags.name: --page-size
optionalFlags.description: page size (0 → server default 50)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin audit list --playtest 01J0... --actor system

commands.name: auth login --discord
commands.description: Discord-federated login. Browser → loopback → backend ExchangeDiscordCode (cli.md §7.1).

optionalFlags.name: --manual
optionalFlags.description: skip the loopback listener; prompt for the pasted redirect URL

optionalFlags.name: --no-browser
optionalFlags.description: do not auto-open the authorize URL

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print authorize/exchange URLs and exit

commands.name: auth login --password
commands.description: AGS IAM ROPC grant for native AGS users. Stores the token under --profile (cli.md §7.2).

optionalFlags.name: --password-stdin
optionalFlags.description: read password from one line on stdin instead of TTY prompt

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin auth login --password --username admin@example.com --password-stdin <pw.txt

commands.name: auth logout
commands.description: Remove the stored credential for --profile (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: auth token
commands.description: Print the active bearer token to stdout for piping into curl/grpcurl (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: auth whoami
commands.description: Print {profile, userId, namespace, addr, expiresAt} for the active token. Non-zero exit if missing/expired (cli.md §6.1).

commands.name: code pool
commands.description: Admin: show CodePoolStats + raw code values for a playtest (cli.md §6.2, PRD §5.7).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: code sync-from-ags
commands.description: Admin: re-sync the local code pool from AGS Campaign API. AGS_CAMPAIGN only (cli.md §6.2).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: code top-up
commands.description: Admin: generate more codes via AGS Campaign API. AGS_CAMPAIGN only (cli.md §6.2, PRD §4.6).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: code upload
commands.description: Admin: upload a CSV of codes (STEAM_KEYS only). Whole-file reject on any violation (cli.md §6.2, PRD §4.3).

requiredFlags.name: --file
requiredFlags.description: path to CSV file ('-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: describe
commands.description: Emit the JSON catalogue of every subcommand. Stable schema cli-schema.v1 (cli.md §5, §10).

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Probe the backend with an unauth GetPublicPlaytest sentinel call. Reports gRPC code + round-trip latency (cli.md §5).

commands.name: flow golden-m1
commands.description: Composite: create-playtest → transition OPEN → signup (synthetic player) → assert PENDING. NDJSON output (cli.md §6.4, §8).

requiredFlags.name: --admin-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for admin steps (create, transition)

requiredFlags.name: --player-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for player steps (signup, status)

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default: 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: platforms for both create and signup (default STEAM)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print every step's request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame flow golden-m1 --slug e2e-1234 --admin-profile admin --player-profile player

commands.name: flow golden-m2
commands.description: Composite: golden-m1 → accept-nda → upload codes → approve → assert APPROVED + code visible. NDJSON output (cli.md §6.4). With --auto-approve, upload-codes hoists before signup and the manual approve step is replaced by assert-applicant-auto-approved (M5.A).

requiredFlags.name: --admin-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for admin steps (create, transition, upload, approve)

requiredFlags.name: --player-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for player steps (signup, accept-nda, get-code)

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default: 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: platforms for both create and signup (default STEAM)

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; @file to load from disk

optionalFlags.name: --codes-file
optionalFlags.description: CSV path to upload (overrides --codes-count; '-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --codes-count
optionalFlags.description: number of synthetic codes when --codes-file is empty (1..50, default 1)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve
optionalFlags.description: create the playtest with auto-approve enabled; rewrites the signup tail to assert-applicant-auto-approved (PRD §5.4 / M5.A)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve-limit
optionalFlags.description: auto-approve cap (1..100,000; required when --auto-approve)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print every step's request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame flow golden-m2 --slug e2e-1234 --admin-profile admin --player-profile player

commands.name: flow golden-m3
commands.description: Composite: golden-m2 → create-survey → submit-response → list-responses. Ten NDJSON lines, stop-on-first-failure (cli.md §6.4, STATUS M3 phase 12). Inherits the golden-m2 --auto-approve variant (M5.A).

requiredFlags.name: --admin-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for admin steps (create, transition, upload, approve, create-survey, list-responses)

requiredFlags.name: --player-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for player steps (signup, accept-nda, get-code, submit-response)

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default: 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: platforms for both create and signup (default STEAM)

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; @file to load from disk

optionalFlags.name: --codes-file
optionalFlags.description: CSV path to upload (overrides --codes-count; '-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --codes-count
optionalFlags.description: number of synthetic codes when --codes-file is empty (1..50, default 1)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve
optionalFlags.description: create the playtest with auto-approve enabled; rewrites the M2 prefix to assert-applicant-auto-approved (PRD §5.4 / M5.A)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve-limit
optionalFlags.description: auto-approve cap (1..100,000; required when --auto-approve)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print every step's request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame flow golden-m3 --slug e2e-m3 --admin-profile admin --player-profile player

commands.name: flow golden-m4
commands.description: Composite: create playtest (DRAFT + startsAt/endsAt set) → await auto-open → await auto-close → assert ≥2 system playtest.status_transition audit rows. Four NDJSON lines, stop-on-first-failure (cli.md §6.4, STATUS_M4 phase 8).

requiredFlags.name: --admin-profile
requiredFlags.description: credential profile for admin steps (create, schedule-info, audit list)

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default: 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --start-offset
optionalFlags.description: how far in the future to set starts_at (default 2s)

optionalFlags.name: --end-offset
optionalFlags.description: how far in the future to set ends_at (default 4s)

optionalFlags.name: --poll-interval
optionalFlags.description: schedule-info poll cadence (default 250ms)

optionalFlags.name: --poll-timeout-open
optionalFlags.description: max wait for DRAFT→OPEN (default 15s)

optionalFlags.name: --poll-timeout-close
optionalFlags.description: max wait for OPEN→CLOSED (default 15s)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print every step's request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame flow golden-m4 --slug e2e-m4 --admin-profile admin

commands.name: flow golden-m5
commands.description: Composite ADT flow: link-adt-start → link-adt-complete → adt-build-list → create-playtest (ADT + --auto-approve) → transition OPEN → signup → assert-applicant-auto-approved → get-adt-download-info → audit assertions. Eleven NDJSON lines. Dry-run-only until B10 wires the live MemClient harness (cli.md §6.5, PRD §4.8).

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title (default 'Playtest <slug>')

optionalFlags.name: --adt-namespace
optionalFlags.description: ADT namespace to link + use (default adt-ns-1)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-game-id
optionalFlags.description: ADT-side game id (default game-x)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-build-id
optionalFlags.description: ADT-side build id (default build-001)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve-limit
optionalFlags.description: auto-approve cap (default 5)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin flow golden-m5 --slug adt-flow --dry-run

commands.name: playtest create
commands.description: Create a playtest. Admin token required. Mutable fields are PRD-whitelisted (cli.md §6.1, PRD §5.1).

optionalFlags.name: --description
optionalFlags.description: playtest description

optionalFlags.name: --banner-image-url
optionalFlags.description: banner image URL

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: comma-separated platforms supported

optionalFlags.name: --starts-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --ends-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --nda-required
optionalFlags.description: set if the playtest requires NDA acceptance

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; prefix with @ to read from a file (e.g. @nda.md)

optionalFlags.name: --distribution-model
optionalFlags.description: STEAM_KEYS | AGS_CAMPAIGN | ADT

optionalFlags.name: --initial-code-quantity
optionalFlags.description: initial code quantity (AGS_CAMPAIGN only)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve
optionalFlags.description: enable auto-approve in Signup (PRD §5.4 / M5.A)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve-limit
optionalFlags.description: auto-approve cap (1..100,000; required when --auto-approve)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-namespace
optionalFlags.description: ADT namespace (ADT only; required when --distribution-model=ADT)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-game-id
optionalFlags.description: ADT game id (ADT only)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-build-id
optionalFlags.description: ADT build id (ADT only)

optionalFlags.name: --adt-fallback-url
optionalFlags.description: Static https fallback download URL (ADT only)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest create --slug summer-stress-test --title 'Summer Stress Test' --platforms STEAM

commands.name: playtest delete
commands.description: Soft-delete a playtest (idempotent). Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest edit
commands.description: Edit PRD-whitelisted mutable fields only. Slug + status + distribution-model are immutable post-creation (PRD §5.1).

optionalFlags.name: --title
optionalFlags.description: playtest title

optionalFlags.name: --description
optionalFlags.description: playtest description

optionalFlags.name: --banner-image-url
optionalFlags.description: banner image URL

optionalFlags.name: --platforms
optionalFlags.description: comma-separated platforms

optionalFlags.name: --starts-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --ends-at
optionalFlags.description: RFC3339 timestamp

optionalFlags.name: --nda-required
optionalFlags.description: NDA required

optionalFlags.name: --nda-text
optionalFlags.description: NDA prose; @file to load from disk

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve
optionalFlags.description: enable auto-approve in Signup (PRD §5.4 / M5.A)

optionalFlags.name: --auto-approve-limit
optionalFlags.description: auto-approve cap (1..100,000; required when --auto-approve)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest edit --id 01J0... --title 'Updated Title'

commands.name: playtest get
commands.description: Fetch the admin view of a playtest. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest get-player
commands.description: Fetch the player view of a playtest. Player token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest get-public
commands.description: Fetch the public view of a playtest. --anon implied (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest list
commands.description: List all playtests in --namespace. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest schedule-info
commands.description: Admin: print {slug, status, startsAt, endsAt, nextAutoTransition} for a playtest. Reads through AdminGetPlaytest (cli.md §6.4, STATUS_M4 phase 7).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: playtest transition
commands.description: Drive the playtest status machine (DRAFT → OPEN → CLOSED). Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.example: pth --namespace mygame --profile admin playtest transition --id 01J0... --to OPEN

commands.name: public-config
commands.description: Fetch the public client config (unauth). Returns player_base_url so the admin AppUI can build cross-app share links.

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: survey create
commands.description: Admin: create the first-version survey for a playtest. Server mints question + option UUIDs (cli.md §6.3).

requiredFlags.name: --from
requiredFlags.description: path to JSON array of SurveyQuestion entries ('-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: survey edit
commands.description: Admin: edit the survey, bumping version and preserving question/option UUIDs for kept entries (cli.md §6.3).

requiredFlags.name: --from
requiredFlags.description: path to JSON array of SurveyQuestion entries ('-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: survey get
commands.description: Player: fetch the current survey version for a playtest (cli.md §6.3).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: survey responses
commands.description: Admin: list submitted survey responses for a playtest. Cursor pagination on (submittedAt, id) DESC; optional --survey narrows to one version (cli.md §6.3).

optionalFlags.name: --survey
optionalFlags.description: narrow to a specific Survey version (id from `survey get`)

optionalFlags.name: --cursor
optionalFlags.description: opaque page_token from a prior response

optionalFlags.name: --page-size
optionalFlags.description: page size (0 → server default 50)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: survey submit
commands.description: Player: submit one-shot survey answers (APPROVED + NDA-current; second submit is AlreadyExists with empty body) (cli.md §6.3).

requiredFlags.name: --survey
requiredFlags.description: survey id the answers target (the version fetched via `survey get`)

requiredFlags.name: --from
requiredFlags.description: path to JSON array of SurveyAnswer entries ('-' reads stdin)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: user create
commands.description: Create N AGS test users via /iam/v4/admin/.../test_users. Admin token required (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --count
optionalFlags.description: number of test users to create (1..100, default 1)

optionalFlags.name: --country
optionalFlags.description: ISO3166-1 alpha-2 country code (default US)

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: user delete
commands.description: Delete an AGS user (destructive). Refuses without --yes (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: user login-as
commands.description: Password-login as a previously-created test user; stores credential under --profile (cli.md §6.1).

optionalFlags.name: --password-stdin
optionalFlags.description: read password from one line on stdin instead of TTY prompt

optionalFlags.name: --dry-run
optionalFlags.description: print the request JSON and exit without dialling

commands.name: version
commands.description: Print {buildSHA, buildDate, goVersion, protoSchema, protoFileCount} (cli.md §5).
